question: My eGFR dropped from 65 to 45 over two years. My doctor referred me to a nephrologist. How fast is this decline and should I be worried?
My creatinine jumped from 1.0 to 2.5 after I was hospitalized. My doctor says I had acute kidney injury. Will my kidneys recover fully?
I have stage 3b CKD with diabetes. What can I do to slow down the progression of my kidney disease?
My potassium level is 6.2 and my doctor says this is dangerous. Why is high potassium so serious and what lowers it?
I have been told I need to start dialysis. What is the difference between hemodialysis and peritoneal dialysis and how do I decide?
My urine dipstick showed 3+ protein. How serious is heavy proteinuria and what does it mean for my kidneys?
I was diagnosed with nephrotic syndrome. What is this and why does it cause swelling and high cholesterol?
I have IgA nephropathy. My nephrologist is watching and waiting. At what point does this require treatment?
My sodium level is 128 which my ER doctor said is dangerously low. What is hyponatremia and how is it corrected safely?
I've been told some of my medications are nephrotoxic. How does my nephrologist adjust dosing and which medications should I avoid entirely?
I have polycystic kidney disease. My cysts are growing. How is the progression monitored and are there treatments to slow it?
I'm approaching end-stage renal disease. My nephrologist wants to place a fistula for dialysis access. Why so early and what does the procedure involve?
I developed a sudden increase in creatinine after starting an ACE inhibitor. Should I stop the medication?
I'm on dialysis three times a week. I've heard I could have a kidney transplant instead. How do I get evaluated for a kidney transplant?
I have renal cell carcinoma and my oncologist mentioned nephrectomy but also asked about preserving kidney function. How do surgeons think about this trade-off?
I have CKD and anemia. My nephrologist prescribed erythropoietin injections. What causes anemia in kidney disease?
I need a CT scan with contrast dye but I have CKD. My doctor is worried about contrast-induced nephropathy. How significant is this risk?
My blood gas shows a metabolic acidosis with a normal anion gap. What does this pattern suggest in the context of kidney disease?
I have lupus nephritis. My nephrologist started me on mycophenolate. How is lupus kidney disease monitored for response to treatment?
I have resistant hypertension and my nephrologist suspects renal artery stenosis. What tests are used to diagnose this and what are the treatment options?
I was recently diagnosed with diabetes and my urine microalbumin is elevated. What does microalbuminuria mean for my future kidney health?
I have CKD stage 4 and a phosphorus level that is elevated. My nephrologist put me on phosphate binders. Why does high phosphorus matter?
I received a kidney transplant three years ago and my creatinine is now slowly rising. What are the common causes of late kidney transplant dysfunction?
My nephrologist said I have oxalate nephropathy from taking too many vitamin C supplements. How does this damage the kidney?
I keep getting kidney stones. My urologist said I should see a nephrologist too. What does a nephrologist evaluate in recurrent stone formers?
I have hematuria — blood in my urine — but no pain. My primary care ordered a nephrology referral. What are the kidney-related causes?
My dialysis sessions leave me feeling exhausted and with leg cramps. Are there adjustments that can make dialysis more tolerable?
I have rapidly progressing glomerulonephritis. My creatinine has doubled in two weeks. What is the emergency approach to this condition?
I am considering a very high protein diet for weight loss. I have CKD stage 2. Is a high protein diet safe for my kidneys?
I was told my GFR dropped significantly after I was dehydrated during a stomach illness. Is this kind of AKI reversible?
